osm-way-166244216.description: Francie's Bar & Grill: Locally owned and operated, Francie's serves up great American style lunch and dinner. Established in 1987, this neighborhood restaurant bar...
osm-way-166244216.snippet: Locally owned and operated, Francie's serves up great American style lunch and dinner. Established in 1987, this neighborhood restaurant bar and grill has your favorite domestic and specialty beers in a casual environment welcoming to everyone.
